---
title: "Group 4 Project 1: Group Proposal"
author: Paul Anderson, Michael Barton, Kevin Kincade
format: pdf
---

```{r}
#| label: install-deps
#| include: false
reticulate::virtualenv_create("r-reticulate")
reticulate::virtualenv_install("r-reticulate", c("requests", "pandas"))
```

```{r}
#| label: install-deps
#| include: false
file.edit("~/.Rprofile")
# add in this 
# Sys.setenv(RETICULATE_PYTHON_ENV = "r-reticulate")
```


```{python}
#| label: check-python
import sys
print(sys.executable)
print(sys.version)
```

```{python}
#| label: fetch-pums
#| echo: false        # hide code in output, remove if you want it shown
#| cache: true        # cache the chunk so it doesn't re-run on every render

import requests
import pandas as pd

API_KEY = "a8f34453c39e419470f405353250f662a508d821"
YEAR = 2024
STATE = "41"

# Example: pull age, sex, income, and employment status
variables = [
    # Outcomes
    "WAGP", "PINCP", "PERNP", "POVPIP", "HICOV", "ESR",
    # Core demographics
    "AGEP", "SEX", "RAC1P", "HISP", "CIT", "NATIVITY", "YOEP", "MAR", "RELSHIPP",
    # Education
    "SCHL", "FOD1P", "SCHG", "SCH",
    # Labor market
    "COW", "WKHP", "WKW", "NAICSP", "OCCP", "WRK", "JWTRNS", "JWMNP",
    # Geography
    "ST", "PUMA", "MIG", "MIGSP", "POWSP",
    # Disability & health
    "DIS", "DPHY", "DREM", "DEAR", "DEYE",
    # Household context
    "HINCP", "HHT", "NRC", "PAOC", "TEN", "VEH",
    # Income components
    "RETP", "SSP", "SSIP", "PAP", "SEMP",
    # Weights & adjustments
    "PWGTP", "ADJINC"
    ]  # PWGTP = person weight

url = (
    f"https://api.census.gov/data/{YEAR}/acs/acs5/pums"
    f"?get={','.join(variables)}"
    f"&for=state:{STATE}"
    f"&key={API_KEY}"
)

response = requests.get(url, timeout=60)
response.raise_for_status()

data = response.json()
pums = pd.DataFrame(data[1:], columns=data[0])
```
